headline: Insights Into Paccar (PCAR) Q1: Wall Street Projections for Key Metrics
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for Paccar (PCAR), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended March 2026.
